channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.description: The United States AI server market is projected to experience exponential growth, escalating from US$ 50.32 Billion in 2025 to US$ 706.20 Billion by 2034, driven by the proliferation of artificial intelligence workloads across cloud platforms and enterprise e… [Intel]

item.title: NVIDIA Stock Hits Record High at $216 on 4% Surge as AI Demand Powers 2026 Rally
item.description: NEW YORK — NVIDIA Corp. shares climbed 4% to close at a record $216.61 on Monday, April 27, 2026, pushing the artificial intelligence chip leader's market capitalization above $5 trillion and signaling renewed momentum in the semiconductor sector amid surging… [Intel, Nvidia]
